name: Chutney Cream Cheese
directions: Combine all ingredients except chutney.
Spoon mixture into a serving bowl and top with chutney.
Serve with crackers.

name: Fresh Figs n' Cream Filling
directions: Warm butter in a non-stick frying pan.
Add figs.
Saute on low flame for 2 minutes.
Remove from flame.
Set aside to cool.
Combine labneh and minced figs.
Mix well.
Spread a thin layer of the mixture.
Fold the crepe into a fan shape.
Repeat the procedure with all the crepes.
Combine the cream with honey to taste in a bowl.
Mix well.
Top each folded crepe with a tbsp.
of cream.
Sprinkle chopped walnuts over it.
Enjoy your dessert!

name: Gala Pecan Spread
directions: Soften cream cheese.
Combine cream cheese and milk; mix well.
Stir in cut up dried beef.
Add green pepper, onions, and seasoningsl Mix well.
Fold in sour cream.
Spoon into baking dish.
Heat pecans in butter, pat dry and sprinkle over mixture in baking dish.
Bake at 350 for 20-30 minutes.
Serve warm with crackers.

name: Hill Country Pecan Spread
directions: Using an electric mixer, blend together softened cream cheese and milk.
Stir in dried beef, green pepper, onion, sour cream, garlic, pepper and jalapenos.
Mix well.
Pour into 1 quart baking dish.
Melt butter in small skillet.
Add pecans and saute over medium heat until light brown.
Spread over cream cheese mixture, and bake in a pre-heated 350*F oven for 20 minutes.

name: Pecan Mushroom Paté
directions: In a large skillet melt butter over medium heat and add mushrooms and shallot.
Saute until shallot is tender and mushrooms give up their liquid.
Stir in salt & pepper.
Reserve 1 Tablespoon of the pecans.
In blender or food processor blend remaining pecans until a paste is formed.
Add the mushroom mixture, cream and madeira, blending until smooth.
Spoon into a serving dish and sprinkle with reserved pecans.
Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Serve with crackers, melba rounds or party rye.

name: Gorgonzola and Toasted Walnut Spread
directions: Reserve 1 tablespoon of the Gorgonzola and 1 tablespoon of the walnuts for garnish.
In food processor, place the rest of the ingredients except the parsley.
Cover and process just until blended.
*If you don't have a food processor, you can mix with an electric mixer on medium speed in a glass bowl.
Stir remaining walnuts into cheese mixture.
Spoon into shallow serving bowl.
Sprinkle with reserved Gorgonzola, walnuts, and the parsley.

name: Pineapple Ham Spread
directions: In a bowl, combine the cream cheese, pineapple and ham. Serve with crackers or bread.

name: Pineapple and Pecan Cheese Ball
directions: Cream the cream cheese.
Add remaining ingredients, reserving 1/4 cup of the chopped pecans. Chill.
Form into a ball and roll in the reserved pecans.

name: Cranberry Delight Spread
directions: In a small mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, orange juice concentrate, sugar, peel, and cinnamon on medium speed, until fluffy.
Stir in the cranberries and pecans.  Refrigerate at least 1 hour.  Serve with crackers.

name: Cranberry and Pecan Cheese Log
directions: MIX reduced-fat cream cheese, cranberries and zest; shape into 6-inch log.
COAT with pecans. Wrap in plastic wrap.
REFRIGERATE at least 30 minute Serve with the crackers.

name: Pineapple Apricot Cheese Spread
directions: In a sieve over a bowl, drain the pineapple, reserving 3 tablespoons of the juice.

In a small saucepan, combine pineapple, reserved juice, dried apricots, chutney, apricot brandy & ginger, then bring to a boil, reduce the heat & simmer 5 to 7 minutes or until thick, stirring frequently. Place in a bowl & chill thoroughly.
Put cheddar cheese, cream cheese & margarine in a food processor & process until smooth, scraping sides of the bowl occasionally.
Combine cheese mixture & cooled pineapple mixture, then spoon into a serving bowl, cover & chill.
